reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I was absolutely dissatisfied because of no placements in 2021.

review_content.Placements: There was no placement schedule for our batch but the teachers were helpful. They provided some references by which few students got jobs. Recently, I came to know that our juniors got a chance to sit in placement in our college. Companies like Byju's visited our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department was not so good but it was okay as the fee was also low. There were facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, etc. But Wi-Fi was not working most of the time but the library was good because no one needs to buy any extra books from the market because all types of books were available in the library. The hostel mess was good as well. I think one could get better food in Dehradun.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college. The important thing is faculty members are very good and co-operative.

review_content.Placements: Placements are fine here, and they depend on your talent and knowledge. Everything is going to be good. Placements are provided in Doon Hospital and other hospitals. The important thing is that our college students are working for BCCI in cricket. Our college also motivates us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is fine but not very good. I think our college makes it better, but it doesn't. However, the environment of our college is superb, and you will like it. The roof of our classrooms is made of a teen shed.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is one of the best colleges in the Dehradun especially in agriculture.

review_content.Placements: Our batch is currently studying and has not passed away from the college so I can't say much about placement but I have heard that there is a good percentage of placements from my seniors as almost every one of them has got placements from the college. I am not very aware of the package so I can't give a review about that and if we talk about the percentage of internships about 70% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a little bit disappointing it should be upgraded. Sports and games are also good. I enjoyed my last sports event organized by our college.

admission_process.title: Sai Institute of Paramedical and Allied Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sai Institute of Paramedical and Allied Science admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Mass Communication and Media and Science.Sai Institute of Paramedical and Allied Scienceadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCBSE 12th and UK 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,47,000 - 2,96,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 54 months - 4 years.

highlights.summary: UIHMT Group of Colleges, is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. Established in 2008, it is an institute. UIHMT Group of Colleges provides 62 UG, PG and Certificate courses in 16 specialisations, namely Auxiliary Nurse & Midwife, Biochemistry, Cyber Law, Dialysis Technology and General Nursing & Midwifery. Theses programmes are offered in both Full Time and Part Time modes. MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA are some of the courses offered at UIHMT Group of Colleges. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media and Law. highlights.summary:

faqs.answer: A:    SBSPM's College of Pharmacy has courses such as M.Pharma, D.Pharma, B.Pharma which are primarily in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. SBSPM's College of Pharmacy has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by SBSPM's College of Pharmacy?

reviews_list.review_title: Good Campus, Value for Money.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of the batch of 2021, and I will pass out in 2025. The placements so far have been good; many students from our college are pursuing PG programs in very reputed colleges, and the rate of GPAT-qualified students is also commendable. Some of my classmates are in NIPER colleges, and others are doing well in companies like Cipla and Mankind.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has all the essential equipment in well-maintained condition, and there are spacious laboratories and a walking library with a lot of books. We have well-maintained classrooms with screens and a good environment around us. We also have a botanical garden on the campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Not a worthy campus. It is small with 4 courses in single building. The hostel food is the worst.

review_content.Placements: As I took admission in the college in 2022, my senior pass out students included around 30 to 35 students. Only 3 of them got their jobs in a company. One of them is in Cipla. Now, as per my observation and information, placements are zero. This college is best for nominal admission or for people who only want a degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good as multiple courses like B. Pharma, D. Pharma, and BCS are in one building. The hostel mess is not that good, and the hostel is only for girls. Having only one building for four courses leads to a shortage of classrooms, and providing one lab for 2-3 subjects.The canteen is good now, as it was upgraded in 2023 due to the NAAC inspection for grade purposes. The infrastructure has been renovated and is now in good condition.

Some of my classmates are in NIPER colleges, and others are doing well in companies like Cipla and Mankind.
content.Infrastructure: My college has all the essential equipment in well-maintained condition, and there are spacious laboratories and a walking library with a lot of books. We have well-maintained classrooms with screens and a good environment around us. We also have a botanical garden on the campus.

individual_reviews.title: Not a worthy campus. It is small with 4 courses in single building. The hostel food is the worst.

content.Placements: As I took admission in the college in 2022, my senior pass out students included around 30 to 35 students. Only 3 of them got their jobs in a company. One of them is in Cipla. Now, as per my observation and information, placements are zero. This college is best for nominal admission or for people who only want a degree.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good as multiple courses like B. Pharma, D. Pharma, and BCS are in one building. The hostel mess is not that good, and the hostel is only for girls. Having only one building for four courses leads to a shortage of classrooms, and providing one lab for 2-3 subjects.The canteen is good now, as it was upgraded in 2023 due to the NAAC inspection for grade purposes. The infrastructure has been renovated and is now in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: GRY institute is the best institute in the area.
reviews.review_text: Colleges provide an eco-friendly infrastructure for students and are the best places to study. There are many facilities available for students, like free Wi-Fi facility, well-maintained classes, well-equipped lockers, and a library with 2000 books and journals. I am not living in a hostel, so I have no idea.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GRY Institute of Pharmacy, Borawan.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available like high-tech classrooms well furnished with projectors and well-updated and equipped labs. Wi-Fi facility is available, there is a big library with 20,000 books, hostel rooms are also clean and maintained, and mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for industrial knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college has hostel facilities which have tasty food. Our college has labs, classrooms, a library, and other facilities. The library has e-books, and there is also a computer lab. Wi-Fi is available in the seminar hall. They have a big garden where the college conducts sports weekly.

reviews.review_heading: The GRY Institute of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many facilities like a library, computer lab, high-speed internet, well-arranged labs, required chemicals, and glassware, and apparatus, and maintains safety management. In the hostel, around 400 rooms are available, but the quality of food in the mess is low, and the canteen is expensive. However, medical facilities are available and strictly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college that provides so many activities and gives good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Very good and excellent infrastructure of the college; it is located in a village area, but it provides so much knowledge and is a very good college for pursuing a degree in pharmacy. Other colleges are not strict, but it is a strict college and takes exams from time to time and gives so much knowledge to students.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Good facility, infrastructure, less money full package.

review_content.Placements: My course is MBBS every batch consists of 150 students in my college. So the average amount of money a doctor MBBS passes out will be around 80k to 90k, a pretty good amount. In MBBS college internship is also there in the last year of college and students get paid for that also.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college's main building is still under construction but the temporary building the government is providing us also has nice facilities. We don't have a library in college which has a lot of good books for study, and the hostel is also fully furnished. We have one B.Ed mattress, pillow, and own table chair, things that are most needed, so hostel facilities need to be updated.

reviews_list.review_title: Quite satisfied with our college and with its infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college is newly built in Andhra Pradesh with the help of the government and has started since the year 2023. So, we are the first batch of our college. Right now, there is nothing I can share about placements, but in the future, I hope for the best for all of us.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite impressive with all new, equipped, and well-managed classrooms. Labs have been provided with all required materials and help students get more interested in studies. The library is open for all students with all the books and publications required, from 9 am to 7 pm.

reviews_list.review_title: Now that you've been allotted to GMC Rajamahendravaram, that's what you got.

review_content.Placements: It's a new government medical college in Andhra Pradesh, and the first batch of students was admitted in 2023. They will complete their course only by 2027, after which an internship will be done in the Government district hospital, Rajamahendravaram. I'm from the second batch of medical students who joined in 2024.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is new, and so is the infrastructure. The students are currently occupied in a temporary building, which has good infrastructure with proper laboratories, demo rooms, a dissection hall, AC lecture halls, proper staff rooms and a central library for the first and second year students. The new building is under construction and is nearer to the hospital. There are separate hostels for freshers and seniors. The seniors' hostels are the new ones. Three in one big rooms with proper shelves and a storage room, a lift facility, and common washrooms, which are cleaned twice daily. Proper shelves. Good signal. Washing machine facility.

They will complete their course only by 2027, after which an internship will be done in the Government district hospital, Rajamahendravaram. I'm from the second batch of medical students who joined in 2024.
content.Infrastructure: The college is new, and so is the infrastructure. The students are currently occupied in a temporary building, which has good infrastructure with proper laboratories, demo rooms, a dissection hall, AC lecture halls, proper staff rooms and a central library for the first and second year students. The new building is under construction and is nearer to the hospital. There are separate hostels for freshers and seniors. The seniors' hostels are the new ones. Three in one big rooms with proper shelves and a storage room, a lift facility, and common washrooms, which are cleaned twice daily. Proper shelves. Good signal. Washing machine facility.
